name: Fish Baked in Coconut Chutney
recipeIngredient: 2 jalapeno peppers, cut in half, seeded
recipeInstructions:
1. In a food processor or blender, finely chop the garlic and jalapeno.
2. Add the coconut, cilantro, mint, cumin seed, water, and lime juice to the food processor. Blend until smooth.
3. Transfer the mixture to a bowl.
4. Combine the oil and turmeric in another small bowl.
5. Place the fish fillets in a foil-lined baking pan.
6. Brush each piece of fish with the oil mixture.
7. Spoon some of the chutney on top of each piece of fish, reserving a couple of tablespoons for serving.
8. Bake in a preheated 450°F (230°C) oven for 12 minutes per inch of thickness of the fish.
9. Serve with the remaining chutney spooned on top and lime wedges.
